summary: Frontend testing of Settings module (Profile, Billing, Support tabs), Auth modal magic link flow, BackgroundPaths animation, and SyncIndicator components. All features working correctly.

issues: GlassAccountSettingsCard component is imported (line 52) but not used in the rendered JSX - component exists but is not integrated

frontend: Auth modal: Opens from 'Get Started' button on landing page
Auth modal: Shows 'Welcome back' title for magic link auth
Auth modal: Email input with placeholder 'you@startup.com' (data-testid='auth-email-input')
Auth modal: 'Continue with Email' submit button (data-testid='auth-submit-btn')
Auth modal: Benefits list shows 'Unlimited free projections for 7 days', 'Save and share your projections', 'Track your progress monthly'
Auth modal: Close button (X) works correctly
Settings page: Loads with data-testid='settings'
Settings - Profile tab: Personal Information section visible
Settings - Profile tab: Company Information section visible
Settings - Profile tab: Full Name input accepts text
Settings - Profile tab: Email Address field with 'Verified' badge (disabled)
Settings - Profile tab: Phone Number input
Settings - Profile tab: Timezone dropdown (5 options)
Settings - Profile tab: Company Name input
Settings - Profile tab: Funding Stage dropdown (5 options)
Settings - Profile tab: Website input
Settings - Profile tab: Save Changes button with loading state
Settings - Danger Zone: Always visible at bottom with red styling
Settings - Danger Zone: Delete Account button present
Settings - Billing tab: Current Plan overview with BackgroundPaths
Settings - Billing tab: Plan badge shows 'Free Plan'
Settings - Billing tab: Plan features grid (Projections, AI Coach, Board Reports, Connectors)
Settings - Billing tab: 'Upgrade to Founder Plan' button visible
Settings - Billing tab: Usage This Month section with 3 progress bars
Settings - Billing tab: Projections usage (2/3) with green bar
Settings - Billing tab: AI Insights usage (5/5) with red bar (100%)
Settings - Billing tab: API Calls usage (142/100) with red bar (over limit)
Settings - Billing tab: Payment Method section with 'Add Payment Method' button
Settings - Billing tab: Invoices section with 2 invoice items (INV-001, INV-002)
Settings - Support tab: Need Help? contact section
Settings - Support tab: Email Support button
Settings - Support tab: Live Chat button
Settings - Support tab: FAQ section with 5 expandable accordion items
Settings - Support tab: FAQ accordion expands/collapses correctly
Settings - Support tab: Resources section with 3 links (Getting Started Guide, API Documentation, Video Tutorials)
Settings - Support tab: Report an Issue section with amber styling
Settings - Support tab: Report Bug button
Tab navigation: Profile/Billing/Support tabs switch correctly
BackgroundPaths component: 131 SVG paths rendered with animation
SyncIndicator: Green pulsing dot visible on Command Centre
SyncStatus: Shows 'Just now' text on Command Centre
RefreshButton: Found with title 'Refresh data'

action_items: Consider integrating GlassAccountSettingsCard component into Settings.jsx (currently imported but not used)
Optional: Add data-testid attributes to Settings tab triggers for easier automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx well-structured with 3 separate components (ProfileSettings, BillingSettings, SupportSettings)
BackgroundPaths properly renders 36 animated SVG paths with varying opacity and widths
SyncIndicator components properly export SyncStatus, RefreshButton, ConnectionStatus, DataCardHeader, and useSyncState hook
AuthModal has proper data-testid attributes for email input and submit button
Form state management in ProfileSettings uses useState with proper save/saved states
FAQ accordion uses AnimatePresence for smooth expand/collapse animations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings module testing complete. All 3 tabs (Profile, Billing, Support) working correctly. BackgroundPaths SVG animation renders in Billing tab. SyncIndicator components (SyncStatus, RefreshButton) working on Command Centre. Auth modal magic link flow tested. GlassAccountSettingsCard component exists but is not integrated into Settings - may be reserved for future use. Preview routes (/preview/settings, /preview/command-centre) bypass auth for testing.

mocked_api.note: Profile/billing data uses fallback values when not authenticated (as per main agent context)
affected_components: Settings.jsx uses default values from AuthContext
BillingSettings uses default 'free' plan if subscription not present
